name: This State Machine applies additive detail animations onto the locomotion cycles depending on how the character is moving.
title: This State Machine applies additive detail animations onto the locomotion cycles depending on how the character is moving.
terms: This State Machine applies additive detail animations onto the locomotion cycles depending on how the character is moving.

name: If the character stops while a foot is planted down, lock the correct foot.
title: If the character stops while a foot is planted down, lock the correct foot.
terms: If the character stops while a foot is planted down, lock the correct foot.

name: If the character stops while a foot is NOT planted down, play a section of the cycle where the foot IS down, and lock it.
title: If the character stops while a foot is NOT planted down, play a section of the cycle where the foot IS down, and lock it.
terms: If the character stops while a foot is NOT planted down, play a section of the cycle where the foot IS down, and lock it.

name: Choose whether a foot is planted or about to plant when stopping using the 'Feet_Position' anim curve. A value <.5 means the foot is planted, and a value >.5 means the foot is still in the air.
title: Choose whether a foot is planted or about to plant when stopping using the 'Feet_Position' anim curve. A value <.5 means the foot is planted, and a value >.5 means the foot is still in the air.

name: The 'Feet_Position' curve also determines which foot is planted (or about to plant). Positive values mean the right foot is planted, negative values mean the left.
title: The 'Feet_Position' curve also determines which foot is planted (or about to plant). Positive values mean the right foot is planted, negative values mean the left.

name: Additive stopping transitions are triggered via the "Entered State Event" on these states.
title: Additive stopping transitions are triggered via the "Entered State Event" on these states.
terms: Additive stopping transitions are triggered via the "Entered State Event" on these states.

title: Look Towards Camera a Look Towards Input

name: This state machine blends the directional cycles together based on the movement direction and the 'HipOrientation_Bias' curve in order to achieve superior blending when switching directions or changing hip rotation.
title: This state machine blends the directional cycles together based on the movement direction and the 'HipOrientation_Bias' curve in order to achieve superior blending when switching directions or changing hip rotation.

name: The blank entry node is used to pick a stance on entry (based on the most weighted BasePose anim curve). It also uses the Grounded Entry State enum to enter an entry override state to transition from other actions, such as rolling.
title: The blank entry node is used to pick a stance on entry (based on the most weighted BasePose anim curve). It also uses the Grounded Entry State enum to enter an entry override state to transition from other actions, such as rolling.

name: Other Movement States such as flying, swimming, or climbing can go here, and can transition via the Movement State conduit
title: Other Movement States such as flying, swimming, or climbing can go here, and can transition via the Movement State conduit
terms: Other Movement States such as flying, swimming, or climbing can go here, and can transition via the Movement State conduit
